# Co-Debtor Stay in Chapter 13 - Section 1301 [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> The co-debtor stay protects cosigners in Chapter 13 bankruptcy. Learn scope, exceptions, and how creditors seek relief. 2026 guide. [Co-Debtor Stay]

## About
codebtorstay.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Codebtor Protection in Chapter 7 vs. Chapter 13 - Co-Debtor Stay: https://codebtorstay.org/chapter-7-vs-13.html
- Codebtor Stay and Community Property States - Co-Debtor Stay: https://codebtorstay.org/community-property.html
- Protecting Your Cosigner in Chapter 13 Bankruptcy - Co-Debtor Stay: https://codebtorstay.org/cosigner-protection.html
- How the Codebtor Stay Works in Chapter 13 - Section 1301 - Co-Debtor Stay: https://codebtorstay.org/how-it-works.html
- Co-Debtor Stay in Chapter 13 - Section 1301: https://codebtorstay.org/
- When the Codebtor Stay Can Be Lifted - Co-Debtor Stay: https://codebtorstay.org/lifting-the-stay.html
- How to Protect Your Cosigner in Chapter 13 - Co-Debtor Stay: https://codebtorstay.org/protecting-cosigners.html
- Creditor Motion for Relief from the Codebtor Stay - Section 1301(c) - Co-Debtor Stay: https://codebtorstay.org/relief-from-codebtor-stay.html
- Who Does the Codebtor Stay Protect? - Co-Debtor Stay: https://codebtorstay.org/who-is-protected.html
- Privacy Policy: https://codebtorstay.org/privacy.html
